rationale: No qualitatively new events affect Romania this cycle — Beirut strikes and Iran deal rhetoric continue as background, and no Black Sea or domestic political developments cross the threshold.

top_events.title: Israeli military strikes Hezbollah targets in Beirut; Israel expands military control by 1,000 sq km
top_events.summary: Continued Israeli operations in Lebanon and Gaza — no direct impact on Romania or Black Sea security. Minor indirect energy price risk persists.

top_events.title: Trump says Israeli attacks on Beirut unjustified, puts Iran deal at risk
top_events.summary: Rhetoric only — no confirmed policy change. Indirect energy market uncertainty remains a minor concern for Romanian consumers.

top_events.title: Romanian government formation (ongoing)
top_events.summary: No new development reported this cycle on the Liberal PM confidence vote — situation continues as background political uncertainty.
